shadowSentences: I love to read books in my free time.
My favorite season is spring because of the flowers.
I usually go for a walk after dinner every day.
My brother enjoys playing soccer with his friends at school.
I often visit the local market to buy fresh fruits.
Cooking new recipes is one of my favorite hobbies.
I like to listen to music while I study in the evening.
Traveling to new places helps me learn about different cultures.
I always try to stay active by going to the gym regularly.
Sharing experiences with friends makes my weekends more enjoyable.
interviewQuestions: What do you like to do in your free time?
How do you usually celebrate your birthday?
Can you describe your hometown and why you love it?
What is your favorite subject in school and why?
Do you prefer spending time alone or with friends?
What is your favorite hobby and how did you get into it?
How do you manage your time between school and leisure activities?
What kind of music do you enjoy and why?
Can you share a memorable experience from your childhood?
What is an important lesson you learned recently?
How do you stay connected with family and friends?
What is your favorite food and how often do you eat it?
